description_long: This object consists of a wooden barrel with visible wood grain texture and two dark metal hoops reinforcing its structure. The barrel is used as an archery target stand, with two arrows embedded in its top surface. Next to the barrel is a wooden frame supporting a rectangular target board, which features a painted bullseye with red, white, and black rings, and some paint drips. A small, weathered paper note is attached to the frame, adding a touch of realism. The overall appearance suggests a makeshift archery practice setup, likely found in a park or recreational urban area.
description: A wooden barrel reinforced with metal hoops, used as an archery target stand, accompanied by a painted target board and embedded arrows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel with two arrows and the full target board with a painted bullseye and attached note.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the barrel's top with one arrow and a clear side view of the target board's painted face.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain wooden back of the target board and the side of the barrel with two arrows visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the barrel's top with one arrow and the back of the target board.
